_template_description: Dialogue-driven structure where key quotes set the emotional sync points. Each quote is a pivot; shots respond to spoken words.

concept.one_sentence: Pick 3-4 iconic quotes across your fandoms. Each quote anchors an act. Shots respond to words.

song.notes: Choose a song with a slow buildup and clear quiet moments between drops so dialogue can breathe.

acts.name: first quote
acts.notes: Open on a quote. Shots establish the world the quote belongs to.

acts.name: second quote
acts.notes: New quote from a different fandom, same emotional register. Tension builds.

acts.name: third quote
acts.notes: Quote that ties the theme together. Land on the drop.
